commands.summary: [AC-1] Added fill-in PBQ support end-to-end: src/types.ts model, src/logic.ts normalized grading, src/App.tsx Practice/Mock rendering, src/styles.css UI states, src/content/validate.ts and scripts/validate-content.mjs validation.
[AC-1] Added one fill-in PBQ per available track: aplus-p09, netplus-p009, secplus-p009.
[AC-1] Tests: src/logic.test.ts covers normalized fill-in grading; src/content/validate.test.ts covers valid and invalid fill-in PBQ structures.
[AC-2] Expanded multi-select MCQ coverage from the item 210 seed set by adding aplus-q391/aplus-q392, netplus-q180/netplus-q181, and secplus-q198/secplus-q199.
[AC-2] npm run validate:content confirms 770 questions and all objective coverage targets remain satisfied.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
